title: Deploy current build live

requirements.text: Confirm and finalize the current build of the Adarshpatel Marketing site for live deployment, ensuring the enquiry contact form correctly submits data to the backend and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to +91 8431628989 on successful submission.

quotes: when submitted, it should open WhatsApp with the details pre-filled for 8431628989

acceptanceCriteria: The enquiry form on the Contact section accepts and validates user input.
On successful form submission, the backend canister records the enquiry.
After submission, the browser opens a WhatsApp link pre-filled with the enquiry details directed to +91 8431628989.
All existing sections (Hero, Navbar, DairyFeed, AgriInputs, CoffeeTrading, Contact, Footer) render correctly.
The site is accessible and functional in a deployed environment.

constraints: Do not alter the immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components).
Keep the single-actor Motoko backend architecture unchanged.
nonGoals: Adding new product sections or categories.
Changing the visual theme or color palette.
Implementing authentication or Internet Identity login flows.
Adding real-time features or external database integrations.
